loop: Ralph Wiggum Loop - Iteration 5 - Family Exploration Passport & Check-in System
status: DONE - All quality gates passed, build clean, 2420 tests passing
summary: Iteration 5 improvements: Added Family Exploration Passport & Check-in System - a gamification feature addressing the PRD KPI of user retention. (1) checkInSystem.ts: Core utility with check-in CRUD, 12 achievement badges (bilingual zh/en), exploration statistics, weekly streak calculation, and badge unlock detection. (2) FamilyExplorationPassport.tsx: Full UI component with stats grid, badge gallery (earned/locked states), check-in button, recent history list, streak banner, and badge-earned toast notifications. Supports compact mode for inline display in LocationDetailPanel. (3) 61 new tests across checkInSystem.test.ts (38 tests) and FamilyExplorationPassport.test.tsx (23 tests). (4) Integrated compact check-in widget into LocationDetailPanel. Final state: 2420/2420 client tests passing (+61 new), 93/93 server tests passing, 0 TypeScript errors, build clean (1883 modules).
next_action: Project enhanced - all quality gates still passing with new gamification features

family_exploration_passport.description: Gamification check-in system with achievement badges and exploration history
family_exploration_passport.retention_impact: Drives repeat visits and exploration through achievement unlocks and streak system

smart_packing_checklist.description: Context-aware family packing list from previous iteration
